source_classes.name: Search engines and cached snippets
source_classes.action: remove at source first, then request de-indexing/outdated-content removal
source_classes.state_hint: indirect_exposure until source or search result disappears

source_classes.name: Phone/address and people directories
source_classes.action: direct opt-out form or LGPD e-mail to privacy/support/DPO
source_classes.state_hint: found when page exposes subject identifiers

source_classes.name: Legal/court/publication mirrors
source_classes.action: mirror suppression/de-indexing; official record correction is human/legal task
source_classes.state_hint: indirect_exposure for snippets or mirrors; human_task_queued for official correction

source_classes.name: CNPJ/MEI/business registry mirrors
source_classes.action: request correction/suppression of stale/private fields from mirror; official Receita changes are user/legal task
source_classes.state_hint: found if private phone/address/e-mail is exposed beyond official need

source_classes.name: Social/profile/user aggregation mirrors
source_classes.action: remove/change original account when user controls it; then mirror removal/de-indexing
source_classes.state_hint: found or indirect_exposure depending on match strength

source_classes.name: Leak/paste/breach indicators
source_classes.action: do not download; request host removal and search de-indexing
source_classes.state_hint: indirect_exposure unless current public page directly exposes data
